Thin Stone Veneer in Bastrop County, TX

Bastrop County offers a mix of piney woods, river bottomlands, and open prairie that sets it apart from the rest of Central Texas. Thin stone veneer helps homeowners in Bastrop, Elgin, and Smithville add natural texture and warmth to their properties, creating an enduring look that complements the area's distinctive character.

Get a Free EstimateCall (512) 706-9699

Natural Stone Character for Bastrop County Properties

Bastrop County sits at the transition between the Hill Country and the Coastal Plain, giving it a unique landscape of Lost Pines forest, Colorado River bluffs, and rich agricultural land. Homes here range from historic downtown Bastrop cottages to new custom builds in master-planned communities, and thin stone veneer enhances them all.

Our work in Bastrop County includes fireplace renovations in charming Main Street bungalows, exterior facade upgrades in the neighborhoods around Bastrop State Park, and outdoor kitchen installations on rural properties near Smithville. We select stone colors and profiles that complement the warm tones of the local soil and the shaded canopy of the Lost Pines.

What's Included With Our Thin Stone Veneer in Bastrop County

Every project includes expert craftsmanship, quality materials, and a commitment to lasting results.

Design & Stone Selection Consultation

We visit your Bastrop County property, assess the project site, and recommend stone profiles that harmonize with the local landscape and your home exterior.

Substrate Evaluation

We check the wall construction for moisture, structural soundness, and surface preparation needs to ensure the veneer adheres properly and lasts.

Moisture Barrier Installation

A breathable weather membrane goes behind the stone to protect walls from water damage, especially important near the Colorado River lowlands.

Thin Stone Application

Each stone piece is set individually in mortar, following a layout designed to achieve natural color variation and visual balance across the surface.

Grouting & Finishing

Grout joints are shaped and cleaned for a finished look, with options ranging from tight dry-stack to wider rustic joints depending on your preference.

Cleanup & Sealing

We clean all surfaces, haul away construction waste, and apply a protective sealer appropriate for the Bastrop County humidity and weather patterns.

Common Thin Stone Veneer Needs in Bastrop County

Bastrop County homeowners use thin stone veneer to enhance both new and existing homes. These are our most frequently completed projects in the area.

Interior & Exterior Accent Walls

A stone accent wall in a family room or entryway adds natural warmth, while exterior accent panels create visual interest and curb appeal.

Exterior Facade Upgrades

Stone facade additions bring depth and character to Bastrop County homes, especially builder-grade exteriors that need a personalized touch.

Outdoor Kitchens & Living Areas

Stone-wrapped outdoor kitchens, smoker stations, and bar areas are perfect for the Bastrop County lifestyle of backyard cooking and gathering.

Column & Entryway Wraps

Transform porch supports and entryway surrounds with stone veneer to create a welcoming, handcrafted look for your Bastrop County home.

Fireplace Surrounds

Stone fireplaces are a centerpiece of many Bastrop County living rooms. We build surrounds that feel grounded and timeless, complementing both rustic and modern interiors.

Retaining Wall Caps & Garden Walls

Finish landscape retaining walls and raised beds with stone veneer for a polished look that transitions naturally into the Bastrop County terrain.

Why Choose Us for Thin Stone Veneer in Bastrop County?

  • Stone craftsmen who understand the unique character of Bastrop County and select materials that complement the local landscape and architecture.
  • A variety of stone profiles from warm sandstone tones to cool limestone grays, chosen to suit the diverse home styles found in the county.
  • Installation methods that account for Bastrop County's humidity, seasonal flooding potential, and the soil movement common in the Colorado River corridor.
  • Lightweight veneer products that achieve the appearance of solid stone masonry without requiring foundation upgrades or structural reinforcement.
  • Professional, detail-oriented crews who protect your property and maintain a clean, organized worksite from start to finish.
  • Stone installations built to endure, using quality materials and proven techniques that hold up through years of Central Texas weather.

Licensed & Insured

Full liability coverage and workers' compensation for every project in Bastrop County.

20+ Years Experience

Decades of hands-on stucco work across Central Texas residential and commercial properties.

Certified Applicators

Certified by Sto Corp, Senergy/BASF, Master Wall, Dryvit, and Parex LaHabra for the highest quality results.

Our Thin Stone Veneer Process

A straightforward approach from start to finish — no surprises, no shortcuts.

1

Stone Selection Consultation

We visit your Bastrop County property with samples, discuss your vision, and recommend stone styles that work with your home and the surrounding landscape.

2

Site Preparation & Layout

We prep surfaces, install weather barriers, and lay out stones in a trial pattern so you can approve the design before permanent installation begins.

3

Stone Installation & Grouting

Our team hand-sets each stone, cuts pieces as needed for a precise fit, and grouts joints to create a cohesive, natural stone surface.

4

Final Inspection & Sealing

We walk the completed work with you, ensure everything meets your standards, clean the stone, and apply a sealer for lasting protection.
